headline: Truist Lowers PT on Intuit Inc. (INTU) Stock to $500 from $739
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On February 27, Truist reduced its price objective on the company’s stock to $500 from $739, while keeping a “Buy” rating, as reported by The Fly. As per the analyst, Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) posted strong Q2 2026 results, with revenues coming […]

headline: Intuit Anthropic AI Alliance Puts Focus On Adoption And Valuation Gap
summary: Intuit has partnered with Anthropic to deploy custom AI agents powered by the Claude Agent SDK. The collaboration will integrate Intuit's financial tools directly into Anthropic's platforms for mid-market businesses and consumers. The deal allows companies to build specialized AI agents that work with industry specific data and automate complex financial workflows. For investors watching NasdaqGS:INTU, this partnership adds a fresh layer to the story around Intuit's use of AI in its...
